name: Godspeed Microsoft Integration Approval Ladder
rationale: Live tenant approval automation is too early. This local ladder models the Microsoft integration gates so the demo can show safe, explicit progression without touching tenant resources.
owner: Walter or delegated Microsoft tenant owner
nonGoals: No secrets or API keys in the repository
No public endpoint deployment from this repo workflow
No production security tooling or customer data connection

gates.title: Approve public HTTPS endpoint choice
gates.purpose: Choose the reviewed sandbox URL or deployment shape before any Copilot Studio or Foundry import points at it.
evidenceRequired: Confirmation that the endpoint serves sandbox data only

gates.title: Approve sandbox authentication mode
gates.purpose: Pick temporary no-auth for a short sandbox proof or scoped API key/OAuth/Entra-backed auth for a deployed proof.
evidenceRequired: Expiration or rotation plan for any credential
Confirmation that no secret is committed to the repository

gates.title: Approve Copilot Studio OpenAPI import
gates.purpose: Approve importing the OpenAPI v2 tool into the selected Copilot Studio environment.

gates.title: Approve Foundry OpenAPI tool configuration
gates.purpose: Approve configuring the Foundry OpenAPI tool and attaching it to the Godspeed agent definition intent.

gates.title: Approve test prompts and screenshots
gates.purpose: Approve the safe sandbox prompt set and evidence captures before using them in the hackathon submission.
evidenceRequired: Screenshots showing selected agents, approval gates and evidence package

gates.title: Block production, customer and security-tool connections
gates.purpose: Keep production/customer data and real Defender, Sentinel, Intune, endpoint-response, ticketing or remediation tooling outside this demo until a separate approval exists.
blockedCapabilities: production scans, patching, isolation, account resets or external communications
